seoTitle: Greenfields vs Greenmount — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Greenfields and Greenmount. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Greenfields and Greenmount.
heading: Greenfields vs Greenmount — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Greenfields, Western Australia and Greenmount, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Greenmount has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Greenfields (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Greenfields or Greenmount safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Greenfields has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Greenmount scores 36/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Greenfields scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Greenmount scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Greenfields or Greenmount?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Greenmount has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
